title: Cash ready, TPIA to pay maturing bonds
body: "The amount of the payment for the Sustainable Bond I Phase II 2018 Series C, which will mature on March 1, 2025, is Rp300 billion."

title: Bima Kurniawan sells shares in CYBR
body: Bima Kurniawan's shares decreased to 27.46 million, or 0.42% of the total 6.48 billion shares outstanding.

title: Ministry of Public Works’ budget cut, biggest impact on Directorate General of Water Resources
body: At least 21 infrastructure projects will be postponed, affecting sectors such as road connectivity, water resources, and residential areas.

title: Abundant nickel to be reviewed for potential national EV
body: Indonesia has abundant nickel resources, yet it does not produce its own electric cars.

title: CGS International acquires nearly 75 million Astrindo Nusantara (BIPI) shares
body: The stakes of two foreign investors in ITSEC Asia (CYBR) reportedly decreased.
